items.title: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
items.dek: The pilot and 10 passengers died in the incident, local officials said.
items.body: The pilot and 10 passengers died in the incident, local officials said.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: She posted about ICE. Five months later, DHS agents told her to take her post down

items.title: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
items.dek: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy ma
items.body: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.
items.author: IriLine Desk
